Current.title: Introduction to Programming I
Current.desc: A Python-based programming course that introduces problem solving, control flow, functions, and core computational thinking.

Current.title: Web Programming
Current.desc: Focuses on building interactive websites and web-based applications, combining front-end structure with dynamic and database-backed components.

Current.title: Analysing Data
Current.desc: A 5-ECTS master's course in the Faculty of Arts focused on data analysis in Semester 2a.

Current.title: Project Text Analysis
Current.desc: Introduces linguistic-level text analysis with spaCy, combining theoretical foundations with practical annotation and exploration of large text collections.

Current.title: Language Technology Project
Current.desc: A project-based advanced NLP course in which students develop solutions for a concrete language technology challenge.

Current.title: Information Science BA Thesis & Research Seminar
Current.desc: Bachelor supervision and research seminar work in which students define, conduct, and report on an individual project in Information Science.
